title: 2-file commit: capitalizeFirstLetter logic improved + toastReducer state expanded
commit_message: refactor: strip empty words in capitalizeFirstLetter; add toastType and toastQueue to toastReducer

why_mixed.explanation: This commit touches two completely unrelated files. utilities.js change cascades into cross-dependent and standalone tests. toastReducer.js change hits feature tests. Together they produce CRITICAL hits across all 3 test categories — the defining signature of a mixed scenario.

src/helpers/utilities.js → capitalizeFir: HIGH    → standalone/utilities.pure.test.js             (same source file, sibling symbols)
HIGH    → cross-dependent/auth-storage.cross.test.js    (isUserLoggedIn, updateNewTokenDetails, generateCardNumber — utilities.js in their sources[])

CRITICAL.reason: describe() label exactly matches a changed symbol AND the source file is in sources[]

tests.test: capitalizeFirstLetter with checkWhiteSpace > capitalizes the first letter of each word in a multi-word string
tests.why: describe label = 'capitalizeFirstLetter with checkWhiteSpace'; sources=[utilities.js]; symbol changed

tests.test: capitalizeFirstLetter with checkWhiteSpace > capitalizes a single word correctly without whitespace branch
tests.why: Same describe — single-word path also affected by the .trim() + .filter() changes

tests.test: capitalizeFirstLetter with checkWhiteSpace > returns undefined when given a non-string truthy value after type guard fix
tests.why: Now returns '' instead of undefined — assertion WILL FAIL
tests.result: ⚠️  WILL FAIL — old code returned undefined for non-strings, new code returns ''

tests.test: toastReducer > initialises with showToast as null
tests.why: describe label = 'toastReducer'; sources=[toastReducer.js]; initialState structure changed

tests.test: toastReducer > TOAST action stores the toast message in showToast
tests.why: TOAST reducer case now reads additional action fields (toastType, queue)

tests.test: toastReducer > resets showToast to null when null is dispatched
tests.why: State shape changed; toastType and toastQueue now part of state

tests.test: toastReducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action
tests.why: Default state now includes toastType='info' and toastQueue=[] — structural change

HIGH.reason: Same source files changed — sibling symbols in utilities.js and sibling describe in favourites suite

tests.test: checkNull > returns an empty string when the value is null
tests.why: sources=[utilities.js] — same file modified, sibling symbol

tests.test: checkNull > returns the original value when it is defined and non-null
checkArray > returns an empty array when the input is null
checkArray > returns the original array when it contains items
checkWhiteSpace > returns true for a string that contains a space
checkWhiteSpace > returns false for a string with no whitespace
getTimes > correctly parses 3661 seconds into 1h 01m 01s
getTimes > returns 0 hours when the duration is under 3600 seconds
getProgressWidth > calculates 50% when value is half of max
getProgressWidth > returns 0 when the value argument is missing or falsy
isUserLoggedIn reads storageKeys.token > returns false when no token is stored
tests.why: sources include utilities.js — same file changed

tests.test: isUserLoggedIn reads storageKeys.token > returns true after a token has been stored under storageKeys.token
updateNewTokenDetails stores values under storageKeys > saves the access token to localStorage under the TOKEN key
updateNewTokenDetails stores values under storageKeys > saves the refresh token under the REFRESHTOKEN key
updateNewTokenDetails stores values under storageKeys > saves the login time under the LOGGEDINTIME key
generateCardNumber output satisfies CARD_REGEX > output of generateCardNumber preserves first and last 4 digits
generateCardNumber output satisfies CARD_REGEX > correctly masks middle digits with X characters
favouritesReducer > starts with an empty userFavourites list
tests.why: Same suite file as toastReducer — conservative inclusion

tests.test: favouritesReducer > UPDATEALLFAVOURITIESDETAILS replaces the favourites list
favouritesReducer > sets favouritesFetched to true once the list is loaded
favouritesReducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action

SKIP.reason: No overlap between changed files and sources[]
skipped_files: test_repository/cross-dependent/payment-state.cross.test.js (sources: paymentReducer, actions, storage, constants — none changed)

coverage_gaps.test: capitalizeFirstLetter with checkWhiteSpace > returns undefined when given a non-string truthy value after type guard fix
coverage_gaps.reason: Old code fell through without returning a value → undefined. New code explicitly returns '' (empty string). Test must change from toBeUndefined() to toBe('').
.trim().length > 0 guard added — empty or whitespace-only strings now short-circuit and return ''
recommended_tests: capitalizeFirstLetter > returns empty string for a whitespace-only input string
capitalizeFirstLetter > returns empty string for an empty string input
capitalizeFirstLetter > filters out consecutive spaces between words

coverage_gaps.reason: toastType and toastQueue fields added to state but no test verifies them
recommended_tests: toastReducer > initialises toastQueue as empty array
toastReducer > TOAST action sets toastType from action.toastType
toastReducer > TOAST action appends to toastQueue when queue provided

selection_proof.key_point: All 3 categories (standalone, cross-dependent, feature) have tests selected — this is what makes it MIXED

jest_run_command: npx jest --config test_repository/jest.config.js --no-coverage -t "capitalizeFirstLetter with checkWhiteSpace|toastReducer|checkNull|checkArray|checkWhiteSpace|getTimes|getProgressWidth|isUserLoggedIn reads storageKeys.token|updateNewTokenDetails stores values under storageKeys|generateCardNumber output satisfies CARD_REGEX|favouritesReducer"
